subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! How can I render thanks unto Thee for having made me the Dawning-Place of tribulations in Thy path and the Rising-Point of trials in Thy way [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و ربی کیف اشکرک بما جعلتنی مشرق البلایا فی سبیلک و مطلع القضایا فی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God
